column4: Development began in 2002 at USC. Gazebo Classic (original version) reached EOL January 2025. Current version is Gazebo (formerly Ignition), representing over 16 years of development. Latest release: Jetty (September 2025, LTS version). Maintainer: arjoc@intrinsic.ai
